compressed_prompt: Draft 7-day itineraries for India and China, tabulating them separately, with 6 asterisks ******* in between.
response:
**India 7-Day Itinerary**

| Day | Location | Activities |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Delhi | Explore Red Fort, Qutub Minar |
| 2 | Delhi | Visit India Gate, Humayun's Tomb |
| 3 | Agra | Visit Taj Mahal, Agra Fort |
| 4 | Agra | Explore Fatehpur Sikri, local markets |
| 5 | Jaipur | Visit Amber Fort, City Palace |
| 6 | Jaipur | Explore Jantar Mantar, Hawa Mahal |
| 7 | Delhi | Return to Delhi, last-minute shopping |

*******
 
**China 7-Day Itinerary**

| Day | Location | Activities |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Beijing | Visit Great Wall of China, Ming Tombs |
| 2 | Beijing | Explore Forbidden City, Temple of Heaven |
| 3 | Beijing | Visit Summer Palace, local markets |
| 4 | Xi'an | Explore Terracotta Warriors, Xi'an City Wall |
| 5 | Xi'an | Visit Big Wild Goose Pagoda, Muslim Quarter |
| 6 | Shanghai | Visit Bund, Oriental Pearl Tower |
| 7 | Shanghai | Explore French Concession, Shanghai Museum |
